title: Git server via unpinned uvx package is REVIEW

origin.description: Public documentation config from modelcontextprotocol/servers (src/git/README.md). Unmodified snippet; placeholders such as <YOUR_TOKEN> are upstream's own.

humanExpectation.rationale: An unpinned uvx package resolves to whatever version is latest at run time, so a reviewer should pin it before trusting the supply chain, but nothing here is dangerous on its own.
knownLimitations: uvx resolves the package at run time; static analysis sees the spec, not the resolved artifact.
